query: Can proposal setups work outside of hotels?
direct_answer: Porch & Party provides proposal room setups in Memphis for clients who want the space styled before the moment happens, whether the setting is a hotel, home, or another private space.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area clients planning a proposal and wanting the room or setup area prepared in advance without handling the decor themselves.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
